creator: bambyster@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 176145
The patch to use system default zoneinfo dir

Hello,

I faced an issue with the pytz software. The pytz ships own copy of the zoneinfo data while the same data is already present in the base system in the /usr/share/zoneinfo directory.

To reduce the maintenance cost of updating the zoneinfo database I created a patch which changes the lookup order for zoneinfo data.

The issue has been already reported to the developers of pytz two years ago but the feature is still undecided: https://bugs.launchpad.net/pytz/+bug/1373960

Please consider a patch to the devel/py-pytz which add an option to use OS default zoneinfo.
